steps.title: AP Boot
steps.desc: Access Point powers on and initializes hardware.

steps.title: WLC Discovery
steps.desc: AP discovers Wireless LAN Controller using DHCP, DNS or Broadcast.

steps.title: CAPWAP Join
steps.desc: AP establishes CAPWAP tunnel with WLC.

steps.title: Config Download
steps.desc: Controller pushes WLAN and RF configuration.
